framework.name: SecNumCloud Cloud Security Certification
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Security certification framework for cloud service providers hosting French government sensitive data
framework.structure_description: ISO 27001-aligned domains plus French sovereignty requirements. 15 domains covering organization, policies, HR, assets, access control, cryptography, physical security, operations, communications, development, suppliers, incidents, continuity, compliance, and data sovereignty.

controls.title: Information security policies
controls.description: The cloud service provider shall define, approve, and communicate information security policies.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire de services cloud doit definir, approuver et communiquer des politiques de securite de l'information.
controls.category: Organisation de la securite de l'information

controls.title: Security roles and responsibilities
controls.description: Security roles and responsibilities shall be clearly defined and assigned.
controls.description_nl: Les roles et responsabilites de securite doivent etre clairement definis et attribues.
controls.category: Organisation de la securite de l'information

controls.title: Contact with authorities
controls.description: Maintain appropriate contacts with relevant authorities including ANSSI.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir des contacts appropries avec les autorites competentes y compris l'ANSSI.
controls.category: Organisation de la securite de l'information

controls.title: Security in project management
controls.title_nl: Securite dans la gestion de projet
controls.description: Information security shall be integrated into project management methodology.
controls.description_nl: La securite de l'information doit etre integree dans la methodologie de gestion de projet.
controls.category: Organisation de la securite de l'information

controls.title: Mobile device policy
controls.description: A policy and supporting measures shall control risks from mobile devices.
controls.description_nl: Une politique et des mesures de soutien doivent controler les risques lies aux appareils mobiles.
controls.category: Organisation de la securite de l'information

controls.title: Teleworking security
controls.description: Security measures shall be implemented for teleworking activities.
controls.description_nl: Des mesures de securite doivent etre mises en oeuvre pour les activites de teletravail.
controls.category: Organisation de la securite de l'information

controls.title: Information security risk assessment
controls.description: Regular risk assessments shall be conducted on cloud services using EBIOS RM or equivalent.
controls.description_nl: Des evaluations de risques regulieres doivent etre conduites sur les services cloud en utilisant EBIOS RM ou equivalent.
controls.category: Organisation de la securite de l'information

controls.title: Risk treatment plan
controls.description: A risk treatment plan shall address identified risks with appropriate measures.
controls.description_nl: Un plan de traitement des risques doit traiter les risques identifies avec des mesures appropriees.
controls.category: Organisation de la securite de l'information

controls.title: Security policy document
controls.description: A comprehensive security policy document shall be maintained and reviewed annually.
controls.description_nl: Un document complet de politique de securite doit etre maintenu et revu annuellement.

controls.title: Policy review and update
controls.title_nl: Revue et mise a jour de la politique
controls.description: Security policies shall be reviewed at planned intervals or upon significant changes.
controls.description_nl: Les politiques de securite doivent etre revues a intervalles planifies ou lors de changements significatifs.

controls.title: Acceptable use policy
controls.description: Rules for acceptable use of information and assets shall be documented.
controls.description_nl: Les regles d'utilisation acceptable de l'information et des actifs doivent etre documentees.

controls.title: Security exception management
controls.description: A process shall manage security policy exceptions with documented justification and compensating controls.
controls.description_nl: Un processus doit gerer les exceptions a la politique de securite avec justification documentee et controles compensatoires.

controls.title: Pre-employment screening
controls.description: Background verification checks shall be conducted on candidates prior to employment.
controls.description_nl: Des verifications de parcours doivent etre conduites sur les candidats avant l'embauche.

controls.title: Terms of employment
controls.description: Employment agreements shall state security responsibilities of employees.
controls.description_nl: Les contrats de travail doivent preciser les responsabilites de securite des employes.

controls.title: Security awareness training
controls.title_nl: Formation de sensibilisation a la securite
controls.description: All employees shall receive appropriate security awareness education and training.
controls.description_nl: Tous les employes doivent recevoir une formation de sensibilisation a la securite appropriee.

controls.title: Disciplinary process
controls.description: A formal disciplinary process shall address security policy violations.
controls.description_nl: Un processus disciplinaire formel doit traiter les violations de la politique de securite.

controls.title: Termination responsibilities
controls.description: Information security responsibilities valid after termination shall be defined and communicated.
controls.description_nl: Les responsabilites de securite de l'information valables apres la fin de contrat doivent etre definies et communiquees.

controls.title: Asset inventory
controls.description: Assets associated with information and processing facilities shall be identified and inventoried.
controls.description_nl: Les actifs associes a l'information et aux moyens de traitement doivent etre identifies et inventories.

controls.title: Asset ownership
controls.description: Assets shall have designated owners.
controls.description_nl: Les actifs doivent avoir des proprietaires designes.

controls.title: Information classification
controls.description: Information shall be classified according to sensitivity and legal requirements.
controls.description_nl: L'information doit etre classifiee selon sa sensibilite et les exigences legales.

controls.title: Media handling
controls.description: Procedures for the management of removable media shall be implemented.
controls.description_nl: Des procedures de gestion des supports amovibles doivent etre mises en oeuvre.

controls.title: Access control policy
controls.description: An access control policy shall be established based on business and security requirements.
controls.description_nl: Une politique de controle d'acces doit etre etablie sur la base des exigences metier et de securite.

controls.title: User access management
controls.description: A formal user access provisioning process shall be implemented.
controls.description_nl: Un processus formel de provisionnement des acces utilisateurs doit etre mis en oeuvre.

controls.title: Privileged access management
controls.description: Privileged access rights shall be restricted and controlled.
controls.description_nl: Les droits d'acces privilegies doivent etre restreints et controles.

controls.title: User authentication
controls.description: Strong authentication mechanisms shall be used for access to cloud management interfaces.
controls.description_nl: Des mecanismes d'authentification forte doivent etre utilises pour l'acces aux interfaces de gestion cloud.

controls.title: Access review
controls.description: Access rights shall be reviewed at regular intervals.
controls.description_nl: Les droits d'acces doivent etre revus a intervalles reguliers.

controls.title: Multi-tenant isolation
controls.description: Logical isolation shall prevent any access between tenants in a multi-tenant environment.
controls.description_nl: L'isolation logique doit empecher tout acces entre locataires dans un environnement multi-locataire.

controls.title: Cryptographic controls policy
controls.description: A policy on the use of cryptographic controls shall be developed and implemented.
controls.description_nl: Une politique d'utilisation des controles cryptographiques doit etre developpee et mise en oeuvre.

controls.title: Key management
controls.description: A key management policy shall cover the entire lifecycle of cryptographic keys.
controls.description_nl: Une politique de gestion des cles doit couvrir l'ensemble du cycle de vie des cles cryptographiques.

controls.title: Customer key management
controls.description: Mechanisms shall allow customers to manage their own encryption keys independently.
controls.description_nl: Des mecanismes doivent permettre aux clients de gerer leurs propres cles de chiffrement de maniere independante.

controls.title: Data encryption at rest
controls.description: Customer data at rest shall be encrypted using algorithms compliant with ANSSI recommendations.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees client au repos doivent etre chiffrees en utilisant des algorithmes conformes aux recommandations ANSSI.

controls.title: Physical security perimeter
controls.description: Physical security perimeters shall protect areas containing information processing facilities.
controls.description_nl: Les perimetres de securite physique doivent proteger les zones contenant les installations de traitement de l'information.

controls.title: Physical entry controls
controls.description: Secure areas shall be protected by appropriate entry controls.
controls.description_nl: Les zones securisees doivent etre protegees par des controles d'entree appropries.

controls.title: Environmental threats protection
controls.description: Physical protection against natural disasters, malicious attacks, and accidents shall be implemented.
controls.description_nl: Une protection physique contre les catastrophes naturelles, les attaques malveillantes et les accidents doit etre mise en oeuvre.

controls.title: Power and cooling redundancy
controls.description: Redundant power supplies and cooling systems shall protect against equipment failure.
controls.description_nl: Des alimentations et systemes de refroidissement redondants doivent proteger contre les pannes d'equipement.

controls.title: Cabling security
controls.description: Power and telecommunications cabling shall be protected from interception and damage.
controls.description_nl: Le cablage electrique et de telecommunications doit etre protege contre l'interception et les dommages.

controls.title: Equipment maintenance
controls.description: Equipment shall be correctly maintained to ensure continued availability and integrity.
controls.description_nl: Les equipements doivent etre correctement maintenus pour assurer leur disponibilite et integrite continues.

controls.title: Documented operating procedures
controls.description: Operating procedures shall be documented and made available to all relevant users.
controls.description_nl: Les procedures d'exploitation doivent etre documentees et rendues disponibles a tous les utilisateurs concernes.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: Changes to the infrastructure shall be controlled through a formal change management process.
controls.description_nl: Les changements a l'infrastructure doivent etre controles par un processus formel de gestion des changements.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.description: Resource use shall be monitored and projections made to ensure required system performance.
controls.description_nl: L'utilisation des ressources doit etre surveillee et des projections faites pour assurer les performances requises.

controls.title: Separation of environments
controls.description: Development, testing, and production environments shall be separated.
controls.description_nl: Les environnements de developpement, test et production doivent etre separes.

controls.title: Malware protection
controls.description: Detection, prevention, and recovery controls against malware shall be implemented.
controls.description_nl: Des controles de detection, prevention et reprise contre les logiciels malveillants doivent etre mis en oeuvre.

controls.title: Backup policy
controls.description: Backup copies of information and software shall be taken and tested regularly.
controls.description_nl: Des copies de sauvegarde de l'information et des logiciels doivent etre effectuees et testees regulierement.

controls.title: Event logging
controls.description: Event logs recording user activities, exceptions, and security events shall be produced and retained.
controls.description_nl: Des journaux d'evenements enregistrant les activites utilisateurs, les exceptions et les evenements de securite doivent etre produits et conserves.

controls.title: Log protection
controls.description: Logging facilities and log information shall be protected against tampering and unauthorized access.
controls.description_nl: Les dispositifs de journalisation et les informations de journaux doivent etre proteges contre la falsification et l'acces non autorise.

controls.title: Vulnerability management
controls.description: Technical vulnerabilities shall be identified, evaluated, and appropriate measures taken in a timely manner.
controls.description_nl: Les vulnerabilites techniques doivent etre identifiees, evaluees et des mesures appropriees prises en temps opportun.

controls.title: Penetration testing
controls.description: Regular penetration tests shall be conducted on the cloud infrastructure by qualified assessors.
controls.description_nl: Des tests d'intrusion reguliers doivent etre conduits sur l'infrastructure cloud par des evaluateurs qualifies.

controls.title: Network security management
controls.description: Networks shall be managed and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.
controls.description_nl: Les reseaux doivent etre geres et controles pour proteger l'information dans les systemes et applications.

controls.title: Network segregation
controls.description: Groups of information services, users, and systems shall be segregated on networks.
controls.description_nl: Les groupes de services d'information, d'utilisateurs et de systemes doivent etre segreges sur les reseaux.

controls.title: Information transfer security
controls.description: Formal transfer policies and procedures shall protect information during electronic transfer.
controls.description_nl: Des politiques et procedures formelles de transfert doivent proteger l'information lors du transfert electronique.

controls.title: Secure API interfaces
controls.description: Cloud service APIs shall be secured with authentication, encryption, and input validation.
controls.description_nl: Les API des services cloud doivent etre securisees avec authentification, chiffrement et validation des entrees.

controls.title: Secure development policy
controls.description: Rules for the secure development of software and systems shall be established and applied.
controls.description_nl: Des regles de developpement securise des logiciels et systemes doivent etre etablies et appliquees.

controls.title: Security testing
controls.description: Security testing shall be performed during development and before deployment.
controls.description_nl: Des tests de securite doivent etre effectues pendant le developpement et avant le deploiement.

controls.title: Secure coding practices
controls.description: Secure coding guidelines shall be applied and enforced during software development.
controls.description_nl: Des directives de codage securise doivent etre appliquees et imposees pendant le developpement logiciel.

controls.title: Supplier security policy
controls.description: Information security requirements for mitigating risks from suppliers shall be agreed with each supplier.
controls.description_nl: Les exigences de securite pour reduire les risques lies aux fournisseurs doivent etre convenues avec chaque fournisseur.

controls.title: Supplier service monitoring
controls.description: Organizations shall monitor, review, and audit supplier service delivery.
controls.description_nl: Les organisations doivent surveiller, revoir et auditer la prestation de services des fournisseurs.

controls.title: Supply chain security
controls.description: Agreements with suppliers shall include requirements addressing information security risks in the supply chain.
controls.description_nl: Les accords avec les fournisseurs doivent inclure des exigences traitant les risques de securite dans la chaine d'approvisionnement.

controls.title: Incident management responsibilities
controls.description: Management responsibilities and procedures shall ensure a quick and effective response to security incidents.
controls.description_nl: Les responsabilites de gestion et les procedures doivent assurer une reponse rapide et efficace aux incidents de securite.

controls.title: Security event reporting
controls.description: Information security events shall be reported through appropriate management channels as quickly as possible.
controls.description_nl: Les evenements de securite de l'information doivent etre signales par les canaux de gestion appropries aussi rapidement que possible.

controls.title: Customer incident notification
controls.description: Customers shall be notified of security incidents that affect their data or services within defined timeframes.
controls.description_nl: Les clients doivent etre informes des incidents de securite affectant leurs donnees ou services dans des delais definis.

controls.title: Evidence collection
controls.description: Procedures for the identification, collection, and preservation of digital evidence shall be defined.
controls.description_nl: Des procedures d'identification, de collecte et de conservation des preuves numeriques doivent etre definies.

controls.title: Business continuity planning
controls.description: The organization shall determine its requirements for continuity of information security in adverse situations.
controls.description_nl: L'organisation doit determiner ses exigences de continuite de la securite de l'information en situations adverses.

controls.title: Service availability targets
controls.description: Service level agreements shall define availability targets, recovery time, and recovery point objectives.
controls.description_nl: Les accords de niveau de service doivent definir les objectifs de disponibilite, de temps de reprise et de point de reprise.

controls.title: Data portability and reversibility
controls.description: The provider shall ensure data portability and provide documented reversibility procedures for customers.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit assurer la portabilite des donnees et fournir des procedures de reversibilite documentees aux clients.

controls.title: Disaster recovery testing
controls.description: Business continuity and disaster recovery plans shall be tested regularly.
controls.description_nl: Les plans de continuite d'activite et de reprise apres sinistre doivent etre testes regulierement.

controls.title: Legal and regulatory compliance
controls.description: All relevant legislative, regulatory, and contractual requirements shall be identified and documented.
controls.description_nl: Toutes les exigences legislatives, reglementaires et contractuelles pertinentes doivent etre identifiees et documentees.

controls.title: Privacy and data protection
controls.title_nl: Vie privee et protection des donnees
controls.description: Privacy and protection of personal data shall be ensured as required by RGPD.
controls.description_nl: La vie privee et la protection des donnees personnelles doivent etre assurees conformement au RGPD.

controls.title: Independent security reviews
controls.description: The organization shall undergo independent reviews of its information security approach.
controls.description_nl: L'organisation doit faire l'objet de revues independantes de son approche de securite de l'information.

controls.title: SecNumCloud audit requirements
controls.description: The provider shall submit to SecNumCloud qualification audits conducted by ANSSI-approved auditors.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit se soumettre aux audits de qualification SecNumCloud conduits par des auditeurs agrees par l'ANSSI.

controls.title: Data localization in France/EU
controls.description: Customer data shall be stored and processed exclusively within France or the European Union.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees client doivent etre stockees et traitees exclusivement en France ou dans l'Union europeenne.

controls.title: Protection against extra-territorial laws
controls.description: The provider shall demonstrate immunity from extra-territorial laws that could compel data disclosure.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit demontrer son immunite face aux lois extraterritoriales qui pourraient contraindre la divulgation de donnees.

controls.title: French/EU corporate control
controls.description: The cloud service provider shall be controlled by French or EU entities with no foreign controlling interest.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire de services cloud doit etre controle par des entites francaises ou europeennes sans interet controleur etranger.

controls.title: Administration from France/EU
controls.description: Cloud service administration shall be performed exclusively from France or EU territory.
controls.description_nl: L'administration des services cloud doit etre effectuee exclusivement depuis le territoire francais ou europeen.

controls.title: No data transfer outside EU
controls.title_nl: Pas de transfert de donnees hors UE
controls.description: Customer data shall not be transferred outside the European Union without explicit customer consent.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees client ne doivent pas etre transferees en dehors de l'Union europeenne sans le consentement explicite du client.

controls.title: Transparency on subcontractors
controls.description: The provider shall disclose all subcontractors involved in service delivery, including their nationality and location.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit divulguer tous les sous-traitants impliques dans la prestation de services, y compris leur nationalite et localisation.

controls.title: Pre-employment screening
controls.description: Background verification checks on candidates for roles with access to cloud infrastructure.
controls.description_nl: Verifications prealables des candidats aux postes ayant acces a l'infrastructure cloud.

controls.title: Security terms in employment
controls.title_nl: Conditions de securite dans le contrat de travail
controls.description: Employment contracts shall include information security responsibilities and confidentiality agreements.
controls.description_nl: Les contrats de travail doivent inclure les responsabilites en matiere de securite et les accords de confidentialite.

controls.title: Security awareness education
controls.title_nl: Formation de sensibilisation a la securite
controls.description: All personnel shall receive regular security awareness training relevant to their functions.
controls.description_nl: Tout le personnel doit recevoir une formation reguliere de sensibilisation a la securite adaptee a ses fonctions.

controls.title: Disciplinary process
controls.description: A formal disciplinary process shall exist for employees who commit security breaches.
controls.description_nl: Un processus disciplinaire formel doit exister pour les employes qui commettent des violations de securite.

controls.title: Termination responsibilities
controls.title_nl: Responsabilites a la fin du contrat
controls.description: Security obligations that remain valid after termination shall be defined and communicated.
controls.description_nl: Les obligations de securite restant valides apres la fin du contrat doivent etre definies et communiquees.

controls.title: Cloud asset inventory
controls.description: A comprehensive inventory of all cloud assets including virtual machines, storage, and networks.
controls.description_nl: Un inventaire complet de tous les actifs cloud incluant machines virtuelles, stockage et reseaux.

controls.title: Asset ownership
controls.description: Each cloud asset shall have a designated owner responsible for its security.
controls.description_nl: Chaque actif cloud doit avoir un proprietaire designe responsable de sa securite.

controls.title: Information classification for cloud data
controls.title_nl: Classification de l'information pour les donnees cloud
controls.description: Customer data shall be classified according to its sensitivity and legal requirements.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees clients doivent etre classifiees selon leur sensibilite et les exigences legales.

controls.title: Data labeling
controls.description: Classified information shall be labeled according to the adopted classification scheme.
controls.description_nl: L'information classifiee doit etre etiquetee conformement au schema de classification adopte.

controls.title: Removable media handling
controls.description: Removable media used in cloud environments shall be encrypted and securely disposed.
controls.description_nl: Les supports amovibles utilises dans les environnements cloud doivent etre chiffres et elimines de maniere securisee.

controls.title: Network access policy
controls.description: Network access to cloud management interfaces shall be restricted to authorized networks.
controls.description_nl: L'acces reseau aux interfaces de gestion cloud doit etre restreint aux reseaux autorises.

controls.title: Privileged access provisioning
controls.description: Privileged access rights shall be allocated through a formal approval process with dual authorization.
controls.description_nl: Les droits d'acces privilegies doivent etre attribues via un processus formel d'approbation avec double autorisation.

controls.title: Access deprovisioning
controls.description: Access rights shall be promptly revoked upon role change or contract termination.
controls.description_nl: Les droits d'acces doivent etre rapidement revoques lors d'un changement de role ou fin de contrat.

controls.title: Password management system
controls.title_nl: Systeme de gestion des mots de passe
controls.description: A password management system enforcing complexity, history, and expiration policies.
controls.description_nl: Un systeme de gestion des mots de passe imposant des politiques de complexite, historique et expiration.

controls.title: Secure log-on procedures
controls.description: Cloud management portals shall implement secure log-on procedures preventing brute force attacks.
controls.description_nl: Les portails de gestion cloud doivent implementer des procedures de connexion securisees empechant les attaques par force brute.

controls.title: Session management
controls.description: Cloud sessions shall implement idle timeout, concurrent session limits, and secure session tokens.
controls.description_nl: Les sessions cloud doivent implementer un delai d'inactivite, des limites de sessions simultanees et des jetons de session securises.

controls.title: Encryption key management
controls.description: A key management system shall protect the lifecycle of cryptographic keys used for cloud data.
controls.description_nl: Un systeme de gestion des cles doit proteger le cycle de vie des cles cryptographiques utilisees pour les donnees cloud.

controls.title: Customer key management
controls.description: Customers shall have the ability to manage their own encryption keys or use provider-managed keys.
controls.description_nl: Les clients doivent avoir la possibilite de gerer leurs propres cles de chiffrement ou d'utiliser des cles gerees par le fournisseur.

controls.title: Key escrow prohibition
controls.description: Customer encryption keys shall not be escrowed or accessible to non-EU authorities.
controls.description_nl: Les cles de chiffrement des clients ne doivent pas etre mises en sequestre ni accessibles aux autorites non-UE.

controls.title: Change management for cloud services
controls.title_nl: Gestion des changements pour services cloud
controls.description: Changes to cloud services shall be assessed for security impact before deployment.
controls.description_nl: Les changements aux services cloud doivent etre evalues pour leur impact securite avant deploiement.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.description: Resources shall be monitored and projections made to ensure capacity meets demand.
controls.description_nl: Les ressources doivent etre surveillees et des projections faites pour assurer que la capacite repond a la demande.

controls.title: Malware protection
controls.description: Anti-malware solutions shall be deployed on all cloud infrastructure components.
controls.description_nl: Des solutions anti-programmes malveillants doivent etre deployees sur tous les composants d'infrastructure cloud.

controls.title: Backup testing for cloud services
controls.title_nl: Tests de sauvegarde pour services cloud
controls.description: Backup and restoration procedures shall be tested regularly for all cloud service tiers.
controls.description_nl: Les procedures de sauvegarde et restauration doivent etre testees regulierement pour tous les niveaux de service cloud.

controls.title: Administrator activity logging
controls.description: All system administrator activities shall be logged and protected from tampering.
controls.description_nl: Toutes les activites d'administrateur systeme doivent etre journalisees et protegees contre la falsification.

controls.title: Clock synchronization
controls.description: Clocks of all cloud infrastructure systems shall be synchronized to an authoritative time source.
controls.description_nl: Les horloges de tous les systemes d'infrastructure cloud doivent etre synchronisees avec une source de temps de reference.

controls.title: Software installation control
controls.description: Installation of software on production cloud systems shall be restricted and controlled.
controls.description_nl: L'installation de logiciels sur les systemes cloud de production doit etre restreinte et controlee.

controls.title: Vulnerability scanning
controls.description: Regular vulnerability scans shall be conducted on cloud infrastructure and services.
controls.description_nl: Des analyses de vulnerabilites regulieres doivent etre conduites sur l'infrastructure et les services cloud.

controls.title: Audit controls for cloud
controls.description: Audit activities involving checks on operational systems shall be carefully planned.
controls.description_nl: Les activites d'audit impliquant des verifications sur les systemes operationnels doivent etre soigneusement planifiees.

controls.title: Network services security
controls.description: Security mechanisms, service levels, and management requirements for network services shall be defined.
controls.description_nl: Les mecanismes de securite, niveaux de service et exigences de gestion pour les services reseau doivent etre definis.

controls.title: Network segregation
controls.description: Cloud tenant networks shall be logically segregated from management and other tenant networks.
controls.description_nl: Les reseaux des locataires cloud doivent etre logiquement separes des reseaux de gestion et des autres locataires.

controls.title: Information transfer agreements
controls.description: Formal transfer agreements shall cover the secure exchange of data with external parties.
controls.description_nl: Des accords formels de transfert doivent couvrir l'echange securise de donnees avec des parties externes.

controls.title: Electronic messaging security
controls.description: Information involved in electronic messaging shall be appropriately protected.
controls.description_nl: L'information impliquee dans la messagerie electronique doit etre convenablement protegee.

controls.title: Addressing security in supplier agreements
controls.title_nl: Prise en compte de la securite dans les accords fournisseurs
controls.description: Relevant security requirements shall be established in agreements with each supplier.
controls.description_nl: Les exigences de securite pertinentes doivent etre etablies dans les accords avec chaque fournisseur.

controls.title: ICT supply chain security
controls.title_nl: Securite de la chaine d'approvisionnement TIC
controls.description: Agreements with suppliers shall address risks from ICT services and product supply chain.
controls.description_nl: Les accords avec les fournisseurs doivent traiter les risques lies a la chaine d'approvisionnement des services et produits TIC.

controls.title: Supplier service monitoring
controls.description: Cloud provider shall regularly monitor, review, and audit supplier service delivery.
controls.description_nl: Le fournisseur cloud doit regulierement surveiller, revoir et auditer la fourniture de services des fournisseurs.

controls.title: Security event reporting
controls.description: Security events shall be reported through appropriate management channels as quickly as possible.
controls.description_nl: Les evenements de securite doivent etre signales via les canaux de gestion appropries aussi rapidement que possible.

controls.title: Security weakness reporting
controls.description: Employees and contractors shall be required to report any observed security weaknesses.
controls.description_nl: Les employes et sous-traitants doivent etre tenus de signaler toute faiblesse de securite observee.

controls.title: Incident assessment and decision
controls.title_nl: Evaluation et decision sur les incidents
controls.description: Security events shall be assessed to decide if they qualify as security incidents.
controls.description_nl: Les evenements de securite doivent etre evalues pour decider s'ils constituent des incidents de securite.

controls.title: Incident response procedures
controls.description: Documented procedures shall ensure a quick, effective, and orderly response to incidents.
controls.description_nl: Des procedures documentees doivent assurer une reponse rapide, efficace et ordonnee aux incidents.

controls.title: Learning from incidents
controls.description: Knowledge gained from analyzing security incidents shall be used to reduce likelihood of future incidents.
controls.description_nl: Les connaissances acquises de l'analyse des incidents doivent etre utilisees pour reduire la probabilite d'incidents futurs.

controls.title: Evidence collection
controls.description: The cloud provider shall define and apply procedures for identification and collection of evidence.
controls.description_nl: Le fournisseur cloud doit definir et appliquer des procedures d'identification et de collecte de preuves.

controls.title: Continuity plan implementation
controls.title_nl: Mise en oeuvre du plan de continuite
controls.description: Documented continuity plans establishing procedures to maintain cloud service availability.
controls.description_nl: Des plans de continuite documentes etablissant les procedures de maintien de la disponibilite des services cloud.

controls.title: Continuity plan verification
controls.description: Business continuity plans shall be verified at regular intervals to ensure they remain valid.
controls.description_nl: Les plans de continuite doivent etre verifies a intervalles reguliers pour assurer qu'ils restent valides.

controls.title: IT infrastructure redundancy
controls.description: Cloud infrastructure shall be implemented with sufficient redundancy to meet availability commitments.
controls.description_nl: L'infrastructure cloud doit etre implementee avec une redondance suffisante pour respecter les engagements de disponibilite.

controls.title: Intellectual property rights
controls.description: Appropriate procedures shall ensure compliance with intellectual property requirements.
controls.description_nl: Des procedures appropriees doivent assurer la conformite aux exigences de propriete intellectuelle.

controls.title: Protection of records
controls.description: Records shall be protected from loss, destruction, falsification, and unauthorized access.
controls.description_nl: Les enregistrements doivent etre proteges contre la perte, la destruction, la falsification et l'acces non autorise.

controls.title: Privacy and personal data protection
controls.title_nl: Protection de la vie privee et des donnees personnelles
controls.description: Privacy and personal data protection shall be ensured as required by relevant legislation.
controls.description_nl: La protection de la vie privee et des donnees personnelles doit etre assuree conformement a la legislation applicable.

controls.title: Independent review of security
controls.description: The cloud provider's approach to managing security shall be independently reviewed at planned intervals.
controls.description_nl: L'approche du fournisseur cloud en matiere de gestion de la securite doit etre revue de maniere independante a intervalles planifies.

controls.title: Compliance with security policies
controls.title_nl: Conformite avec les politiques de securite
controls.description: Managers shall regularly review compliance within their area of responsibility.
controls.description_nl: Les responsables doivent regulierement verifier la conformite dans leur domaine de responsabilite.

controls.title: Technical compliance review
controls.description: Information systems shall be regularly reviewed for compliance with security policies and standards.
controls.description_nl: Les systemes d'information doivent etre regulierement revus pour la conformite aux politiques et normes de securite.

controls.title: Immunity from non-EU data access laws
controls.description: The provider's governance and technical architecture shall ensure immunity from non-EU data access legislation.
controls.description_nl: La gouvernance et l'architecture technique du fournisseur doivent assurer l'immunite aux legislations non-UE d'acces aux donnees.

controls.title: Source code auditing
controls.description: Source code of cloud platform components shall be auditable by qualified third parties upon request.
controls.description_nl: Le code source des composants de la plateforme cloud doit etre auditable par des tiers qualifies sur demande.
